measurement_note: Size is N, the binary string length. Each workload contains one long ones segment followed by a slightly shorter zeros segment, exercising the complete O(N) scan. A correct implementation that restarts a forward run scan from every position completes all legal tiers and fails only by O(N^2) scaling.

cases.name: benchmark: compare runs in a 6-character string
